summary: Comprehensive DevSync testing completed - backend APIs and frontend UI tested successfully

flaky_endpoints.issue: Brute force protection not working correctly - should return 429 after 5 failed attempts but continues returning 401
flaky_endpoints.impact: Security vulnerability - accounts not properly locked after multiple failed login attempts

integration_issues.issue: Chart width/height error in console - chart dimensions showing as -1

design_issues.issue: Theme toggle not found on dashboard page - only available on auth page

passed_tests: Platform list endpoint with user scoping
CRITICAL: User isolation - no cross-user data leakage
Frontend dashboard displays stats and charts
Theme toggle on auth page (dark/light mode)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (UI loads, navigation works, minor chart issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix brute force protection logic in /api/auth/login endpoint - should return 429 status after 5 failed attempts. Add theme toggle to dashboard and other authenticated pages.
